power_integrity.desc: All power and ground pins must be connected.

configuration_pins.desc: Configuration and SDM pins must be wired per the selected boot scheme.

serdes_refclk.desc: Refclk pair selection and quad mapping must match the chosen transceiver usage.

high_speed_serial.review_note: Agilex 5 transceiver protocol/IP enablement still depends on the selected ordering code, package migration limits, and design-specific quad usage.

PCIe 4.0.note: PCI Express reference clocks are typically implemented as 100 MHz differential HCSL or translated equivalents.

10G Ethernet.note: 10G serial Ethernet families commonly use a 156.25 MHz differential reference clock.

refclk_requirements.selection_note: Refclk frequency, clock standard, jitter budget, and pair-to-quad mapping must be frozen against the selected protocol before schematic sign-off.

lane_group_mappings.selection_note: Freeze the protocol/IP assignment for this lane group and bind it to one of the mapped refclk pairs before schematic sign-off.
